---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when..." or "It would be useful to..."

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like in clear, concrete terms.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use case

Describe the use case. When and why would someone need this feature?

Example:
- Team size: small/medium/large
- On-call setup: yes/no
- Issue frequency: high/medium/low

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
